name: Sensity AI
description: Sensity AI — deepfake detection and visual threat intelligence API.

seo.title: Sensity AI — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Sensity AI: Sensity AI — deepfake detection and visual threat intelligence API.

when_to_use: Detecting synthetic media and AI-generated faces in uploaded content
Verifying identity document authenticity against deepfake forgeries
Integrating deepfake detection into media verification pipelines
Monitoring platforms for AI-generated impersonation at scale

pros: Strong research reports on synthetic media trends
Used by KYC and fraud teams
cons: Detection accuracy drifts with new generators
Limited in audio and text modalities
review.verdict: Credible deepfake detection vendor, especially in identity and KYC; benchmark against Reality Defender.
review.best_for: KYC, fraud, and identity teams screening against synthetic photos and video.
review.not_for: Multimodal moderation needs or teams wanting cheap self-serve APIs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
